/usr/bin/c++  -ffast-math -frounding-math -fno-finite-math-only -fdiagnostics-color=always -fno-var-tracking-assignments -Wno-deprecated -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wno-strict-aliasing -pg -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-check -O2 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ygor_conditional_forest_train.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ygor_conditional_forest_train.dir/Ygor_Conditional_Forest_Train.cc.o -o ../bin/ygor_conditional_forest_train  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/Ygor/Ygor/build-min/lib: ../lib/libygor.so -lm
